project_type: Firebase web billing application (vanilla JS, ES modules via CDN)
build_system: None - static files served directly, Firebase SDK loaded from CDN
verification_instructions: Static analysis and code review. Verify JavaScript syntax is valid by checking for parse errors.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML/JS/CSS files
environment_constraints: No build system, no tests, no Docker. Verification is done through code review and syntax checking.
key_patterns: Single-file app (billingappfiles/script.js, ~4618 lines). Firestore real-time listeners via onSnapshot. Transactions for serial number assignment. Two-copy print system (CUSTOMER COPY + OFFICE COPY). The circle-1 indicator shows on OFFICE COPY only for the first W and R bill of each day.
directory_structure: billingappfiles/ contains bill.html (entry point), script.js (all logic), style.css (styles), and pricelistfiles/ subdirectory for pricelist sub-app.
